title: Prayer to People
content:
I go through the days
    Like a thief.
    And no one hears
    My heart lament to itself.
    Please have pity.
    Like me.
    I hate you.
    I want to embrace you.
meaning:
"Prayer to People" is a quintessential example of Alfred Lichtenstein's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
